title: Fridericia trailii
taxonomy: Fridericia trailii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. Fridericia trailii is further divided into the genus Fridericia, which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The genus Fridericia is a part of the Apocynaceae family and is closely related to other genera such as Heterostemma and Tabernaemontana. Within the plant kingdom, Fridericia trailii is classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida.
